_schema_note: This file is the shape `memtrust run` output maps into for the static leaderboard site. One real entry exists (mem0_direct, populated from an actual live run -- see leaderboard/mem0_direct-2026-07-20.json for the full raw report). The other four are still schema placeholders: no live vendor API keys were available for them when this repo was built. Run `memtrust run --backends mempalace,mem0,zep,openviking --eval all` yourself with real credentials to populate them. See docs/methodology.md and the README's Benchmarks section.

backends.name: mem0
backends.note: Mem0's hosted Platform API, not yet run live. See mem0_direct below for the self-hosted mem0ai library instead -- a different deployment mode of the same project, not a substitute for this row.

backends.name: mem0_direct
backends.note: Self-hosted mem0ai OSS library run in-process via Mem0DirectAdapter, backed by a local Qdrant instance and the OpenAI API -- not Mem0's hosted Platform API (see the mem0 row above). longmemeval_accuracy/locomo_accuracy are null because those evals weren't run this pass; compression and extraction_quality results (not in this schema) are in leaderboard/mem0_direct-2026-07-20.json and README.md's Benchmarks section.
